metadata.description: Khalil Mageed (Khalil AbdalMageed) is a web developer based in Cairo specializing in restaurant websites, ecommerce stores, and local business sites built with Next.js and React. Get a free quote today!

home.title: Hey, I'm
home.subtitle: Web Developer
home.description: I build websites that actually work for businesses.
home.descriptionExtended: Restaurants? Ecommerce? I create sites that bring in customers, not generic templates.

freelance.desc: Building custom websites for restaurants, ecommerce stores, and local businesses. Focused on sites that actually convert visitors into customers.

fullstack.desc: Delivered award-winning web experiences for global brands and built robust enterprise applications.

home.whoIHelpRestaurantsDesc: Online menus, reservations, and ordering systems that turn visitors into customers.
home.whoIHelpEcommerceDesc: Online stores that actually sell, built to be fast, clean, and ready to grow.
home.whoIHelpLocalDesc: Professional websites that build trust and make you look legit online.
home.viewProjectsDesc: 9 restaurant demo sites with different styles and different price points. See exactly what your future site could look like.
home.viewDemosDesc: From simple product pages to full-blown online stores. Pick a style that fits your business.
home.viewCaseStudiesDesc: Real projects, real decisions, real results. Here's how I actually think and build.
home.viewBlogDesc: Honest takes on what a website actually costs, and why cheap usually ends up expensive.
